title: Venezuela raises questions for tanker demand
section_path: Venezuela raises questions for tanker demand
section_path_text: Venezuela raises questions for tanker demand
summary:
Main
Post US operation to remove Maduro from Venezuela will we revert to pre-Venezuela sanctions trade patterns? Which tanker sector stands to benefit? Can exports quickly increase, or will the region descend into chaos?
